tasks.build:sdk: cargo run --manifest-path ../../../rust/Cargo.toml -p trellis-cli --bin trellis -- contracts build --source ../../../js/services/jobs/contracts/trellis_jobs.ts --out-manifest ../../../generated/contracts/manifests/trellis.jobs@v1.json --ts-out ../../../generated/js/sdks/jobs --rust-out ../../../generated/rust/sdks/jobs --package-name @qlever-llc/trellis-sdk-jobs --crate-name trellis-sdk-jobs --runtime-source local --runtime-repo-root ../../..
tasks.verify:contracts: cargo run --manifest-path ../../../rust/Cargo.toml -p trellis-cli --bin trellis -- contracts verify --source ../../../js/services/jobs/contracts/trellis_jobs.ts
tasks.check: deno task -c ../../deno.json build:sdk && deno check main.ts bootstrap.ts rpcs.ts contracts/trellis_jobs.ts
